entries.title: Commentary on Tobit on tobit 11:16
entries.excerpt: The seven days signify the light of spiritual grace, which is taken as sevenfold. Therefore, after seven days, Tobias, having been illuminated, his son's wife enters, because after Judaea has been illuminated through faith, after receiving the grace of the Holy Spirit, the Church will enter it, so that there may be one fold and one shepherd, and one house of Christ founded on one cornerstone.

entries.title: Commentary on Tobit on tobit 11:16
entries.excerpt: The livestock and camels also entered, and the wife's considerable wealth. Many faithful persons and many virtues of the Church will then be gathered among the Jewish people.

entries.title: Commentary on Tobit on tobit 11:16
entries.excerpt: But also the money that he had received from Gabael. The knowledge of the Scriptures, which they once lent to the Gentiles, will then be returned to them.
